description_long: This is a large, rectangular, freestanding cabinet or planter box with a matte dark gray exterior. The structure is composed of solid, flat panels forming four vertical sides and an open top, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative features. The interior is partially filled with a variety of green plants, including succulents and small shrubs, which are visible above the rim. The exterior panels are divided into rectangular sections, giving the object a modular, modern appearance. The object appears robust and is likely constructed from metal or a composite material, suitable for outdoor urban environments. Its size and design suggest it could serve as a planter or a storage unit in public spaces such as parks, plazas, or sidewalks.
description: A large, matte dark gray rectangular cabinet or planter box with modular paneling and visible green plants inside. Its open top and robust build make it suitable for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, dark gray paneling, and a few green plants visible inside.
description_view_1: Opposite side with more plants visible above the rim, highlighting the interior foliage.
description_view_2: Side view with fewer visible plants and a clear view of the modular panel design.
description_view_3: Back view with a mix of visible plants and the same modular paneling as other sides.
